productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Firebird Red Track Pants
description: Composition  Red track pants made of 87% cotton and 13% polyester, has adidas' patented Triple-Stripes running along the sides of the legs, elasticated and ribbed waistband that has a drawstring on the inside, zippered pockets on the sides and embroidered brand name over the left leg Fit Comfort Wash care Wash dark colours separately below 40 degrees Do not soak, bleach, dry clean or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on print/trims/logo Made of stretchable cotton fabric, these adidas tracks are ideal for all your training needs. While the soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly around your hips, the drawstring on the inside allows for a customised fit. The stretchable fabric moves with your body making everything easier, from yoga sessions to gymming. Pair it with Sports t-shirts and performance shoes for an extended training session. Model statistics The product has a length of 38.5" on a model of height 5'9" and waist 26"
